_comment: XamPreps V2 Minimal Import Sample - Single MCQ Exam
_description: This is a minimal working example showing the exact JSON structure needed to import one V2 exam into Firestore. It contains 1 exam, 1 section, 1 instruction group, 1 item, 1 interaction, 1 marking rule, and 1 model answer version.
_note: Do NOT include fields marked as auto-generated. Date fields (createdAt, updatedAt) are auto-set by the system.

exam.title: Sample Mathematics Quiz
exam.subject: Mathematics
exam.overallInstructions: Answer all questions. Choose the correct answer from the options given.

section._note: Auto-generated fields: sectionId, createdAt, updatedAt. Requires examId from step 1.
section.title: Section A

instructionGroup._note: Auto-generated fields: instructionGroupId, createdAt, updatedAt. Requires examId + sectionId.
instructionGroup.instructionsMarkdown: Choose the correct answer from the options A, B, C, and D.

item._note: Auto-generated fields: itemId, createdAt, updatedAt. Requires examId + sectionId.

interaction._note: Auto-generated fields: interactionId, createdAt, updatedAt. Requires itemId + examId.

markingRule._note: Auto-generated fields: markingRuleId, createdAt, updatedAt. No dependencies.

modelAnswerVersion._note: Auto-generated fields: modelAnswerVersionId, createdAt. Requires itemId + interactionId.
modelAnswerVersion.explanation: 7 × 8 = 56. This is a basic multiplication fact.

usageInstructions.step1: Create the exam document first. Capture the auto-generated examId.
usageInstructions.step2: Replace {{examId}} with the actual examId in all subsequent documents.
usageInstructions.step3: Create the section document. Capture the auto-generated sectionId.
usageInstructions.step4: Replace {{sectionId}} with the actual sectionId in subsequent documents.
usageInstructions.step5: Create the instructionGroup document. Capture the auto-generated instructionGroupId.
usageInstructions.step6: Replace {{instructionGroupId}} with the actual instructionGroupId in the item document.
usageInstructions.step7: Create the item document. Capture the auto-generated itemId.
usageInstructions.step8: Replace {{itemId}} with the actual itemId in the interaction and modelAnswerVersion documents.
usageInstructions.step9: Create the interaction document. Capture the auto-generated interactionId.
usageInstructions.step10: Replace {{interactionId}} with the actual interactionId in the modelAnswerVersion document.
usageInstructions.note: Date fields (createdAt, updatedAt) are auto-generated by the system. Do not include them in your import JSON.

programmaticImportExample.description: Pseudocode for programmatic import using v2-collections.ts functions
